title: New Files gallery
excerpt: Please Please can we have view controls such as zoom and pan in the gallery view. As a graphics firm we work primarily with images and not having these tools prevents us from using files in Monday.com. Will this be a fea…

posts.author: gmh_2001 (Gethin Hooper)
posts.cookedHtml: Please Please can we have view controls such as zoom and pan in the gallery view. As a graphics firm we work primarily with images and not having these tools prevents us from using files in Monday.com. Will this be a feature in an upcoming release?
